text:
Once upon a moonlit night, there lived a giant tortoise named Gromovhuhmonda the Magnificent. Gromovhuhmonda loved nothing more than exploring the enchanted land of Snailonia.

One day, Gromovhuhmonda discovered a mysterious glowing flower. Curious, she picked it up. Then, suddenly, a tiny fairy flew out, annoyed.

"Oh no! That flower might hurt you!" she squealed.

"Huh?" Gromovhuhmonda pondered, curious.

The fairy continued, "If you eat it, you'll never talk again!"

Gromovhuhmonda thought about that. She imagined herself chatting away with her friends.

"If I can't talk?" she thought.

The fairy danced away, leaving Gromovhuhmonda with her dream.

The next morning, she felt different—tingly.

"Nope," she declared. "Talking!"

She smiled.

The fairy returned!

"Oh dear!" she giggled. "
